mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) as totalEvaluations, ROUND(AVG(teaching_quality), 1) as avgTeachingQuality, ROUND(AVG(content_quality), 1) as avgContentQuality, ROUND(AVG(interaction_score), 1) as avgInteractionScore, ROUND(AVG(resource_quality), 1) as avgResourceQuality, ROUND(AVG(overall_score), 1) as avgOverallScore FROM stat_teaching_evaluation WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
